mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REGION_MASTER ( REGION_CODE, SIGUNGU_CODE, REGION_NAME, SIGUNGU_NAME ) VALUES ( #{region_code}, #{sigungu_code}, #{region_name}, #{sigungu_name} )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT REGION_CODE, REGION_NAME FROM REGION_MASTER ORDER BY REGION_CODE
SELECT SIGUNGU_CODE, SIGUNGU_NAME FROM REGION_MASTER WHERE REGION_CODE = #{regionCode} ORDER BY SIGUNGU_CODE
